articles.title_en: Ukraine strikes Rosneft oil refinery in Russia, sparking major fire. Two killed.
articles.lead_en: Two people were killed and several others wounded in a Ukrainian drone strike on Syzran, Samara region Governor Vyacheslav Fedorishchev said, without providing further details.
